steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage ends with a pivotal statement: the album “helped redefine how scholarship is created and shared.” The entire passage is structured around explaining this transformative claim—showing not just what Carson did, but why it matters and how it changed scholarly practice.

steps.title: Match this signal to the choices
steps.content: To explain why an album is particularly innovative—demonstrating how its merged elements and peer review approach made it transformative—is exactly what choice D describes. Choices A, B, and C call for different purposes: comparing public impact, detailing peer review steps, or presenting individual opinion. That matches choice D — D is correct.
